LOADOUT-INEVITABLE.title: Inevitable
LOADOUT-INEVITABLE.description: Returns to your [gold]Hand[/gold] when [gold]Exhausted[/gold], returns to your [gold]Deck[/gold] when removed, and transforms into a copy of itself.
LOADOUT-STICKY.title: Sticky
LOADOUT-STICKY.description: Returns to your [gold]Hand[/gold] after being played or discarded.
LOADOUT-X_COST.title: X Cost
LOADOUT-X_COST.description: Costs X. This card's plays are repeated X times.
LOADOUT-INFINITE_UPGRADE.title: Infinite Upgrade
LOADOUT-PASSING.title: Passing
LOADOUT-PASSING.description: After being played, this card is given to a random ally.
